page: Vultr vcg-a40-12c-60g-24vram is a virtual machine in the Cloud GPU family. It features an Intel x86_64 architecture with 12 vCPUs and 12 physical cores, operating with a single thread per core. The system is equipped with 60.0 GB of system memory, providing 5.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes a fractional GPU allocation consisting of 0.5 of an NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, which delivers 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is bundled with the instance, providing 1110 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. Additionally, the server comes with one complimentary public IPv4 address.

The primary hardware tradeoff of this instance is its shared CPU allocation, which may introduce performance variability under sustained multi-core processing loads. However, the fractional GPU model offers a cost-efficient entry point for workloads that require GPU acceleration and substantial VRAM but do not demand a full dedicated graphics card.

This hardware profile is designed for workloads such as medium-scale machine learning inference, data science tasks, video transcoding, and database applications that benefit from GPU acceleration and fast local NVMe storage.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-12c-60g-24vram is a Cloud GPU instance designed for workloads requiring GPU acceleration without the cost of a full dedicated card. Built on the Intel x86_64 architecture, it features 12 vCPUs and 12 physical cores with a shared CPU allocation. The server is equipped with 60.0 GB of system memory, translating to 5.0 GB of RAM per core. Graphics processing is handled by a fractional 0.5 NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. Storage needs are met by a bundled 1110 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one public IPv4 address. The shared CPU allocation presents a performance tradeoff for sustained compute-heavy tasks, but the fractional GPU configuration provides a cost-efficient resource density. This server is suitable for machine learning inference, data science pipelines, and GPU-accelerated database workloads.

tagline: A fractional GPU instance featuring an NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, 60 GB RAM, and local NVMe storage for accelerated workloads.
